# Cake Forest

> Cake Forest is a bakery in KK Nagar, Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India. We specialise in birthday cakes, special occasion cakes, pastries, and desserts — baked fresh daily.

## About

Cake Forest is a beloved local bakery known for its handcrafted cakes and warm service. Every item is made fresh with quality ingredients.

## Location & Contact

- **Address**: No. 14, Fruit Market Shopping Complex, Melur Main Road, K.K. Nagar, Madurai, Tamil Nadu
- **Phone**: +91 96260 99991
- **Hours**: Monday – Sunday, 9:15 AM – 11:00 PM
- **Website**: https://cakeforest.store

## Order Online

- Swiggy: https://www.swiggy.com/city/madurai/cake-forest-melur-main-road-kk-nagar-rest649154
- Zomato: https://www.zomato.com/madurai/cake-forest-kk-nagar

## Social

- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/cakeforest_/

## Gallery

A photo gallery of 31 product photographs is available at https://cakeforest.store/gallery.html — covering birthday cakes, special cakes, pastries, and desserts.

## Menu Highlights

- Birthday Cakes — from ₹400
- Special Cakes (Truffle, Blue Citrus, Kulfi Almond) — from ₹400
- Pastries (Butterscotch, Choco Truffle, Red Velvet) — from ₹77
- Desserts (Tiramisu, Choco Lava) — from ₹60
- Rich Plum Cakes — from ₹150
- Berliner Doughnuts, Cookies, Brownies
